title: FBombs
description: Inspired by old-school Forge nuke mods, this has everything that goes boom!
body:
# FBombs

[![](https://i.imgur.com/UoIBayo.png)](https://modfest.net/1.21)

Inspired by old-school Forge nuke mods, this has everything that goes boom!

Included are Explodables with all sort of utilities and fun interactions. Examples are
- Splittable and Shearable TNT blocks
- TNT block with varying amount of fuse times and strength
- Underwater TNT, Water draining TNT and more explosive utilities which you may know from the old days
- Dynamite and other Throwables
- Gunpowder trails

... and many more little secrets.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LEghcpvj/images/68ca18fd4149d62d3eb555f2e6de07c32e0579cc.png)

### [Work In Progress] content

In addition, very large explosives are supported and kept performant.
This includes Nuclear options, which also feature a contamination system, wearables and other utilities to immerse yourself in the deadly art of destruction.
